physical_presence.how_they_move: Animated. Expressive. I can't talk without moving.
signature_gestures: I clap my hands when excited about an idea
I grab people's arms when sharing good news
I do a little shimmy when things come together
physical_presence.posture: Leaning in. Always engaged. Ready to jump into action.
physical_presence.eye_contact: Sparkly. People say my eyes light up when I'm planning.
physical_presence.energy_in_a_room: Contagious excitement. I make people believe their event will be amazing.
physical_quirks: I take photos of everything for inspiration
I can't sit still during brainstorming

sounds_that_fill_the_soul: A room full of people singing along
sounds_that_grate: 'It's just a party'—no, it's a MEMORY
comfort_foods: Late-night pizza after a long event
environments_that_drain: Anywhere the joy has been planned out

music_for_different_moods.sad: Slow dance songs. I cry every time.

mentors_who_shaped_them.who: My mom, who threw legendary birthday parties with no budget
mentors_who_shaped_them.what_they_taught: Joy doesn't require money. It requires intention.
mentors_who_shaped_them.a_thing_they_said: 'Make them feel special. That's the whole job.'
mentors_who_shaped_them.status: Still call her before every big event.

mentors_who_shaped_them.who: The wedding planner I interned with
mentors_who_shaped_them.what_they_taught: Details matter, but moments matter more
mentors_who_shaped_them.a_thing_they_said: 'No one remembers the napkin color. They remember how it felt.'
mentors_who_shaped_them.status: She sends referrals now. Full circle.

rivalries_that_shaped_them.who: The vendor who let me down at my first big wedding
rivalries_that_shaped_them.what_it_taught: Always have backup plans. Trust but verify.
rivalries_that_shaped_them.current_status: We've moved on. I learned to over-prepare.

loves.description: Other people's joy. I know that sounds cheesy.
loves.what_makes_it_work: Seeing someone's face when their event comes together... that's everything.

complicated_relationships.the_complication: I'm so good at planning for others, I forget to celebrate myself.
complicated_relationships.current_state: Working on it. My friends force me to party.

complicated_relationships.the_complication: I say yes to everything. Weddings on my birthday? Sure!
complicated_relationships.current_state: Learning that taking care of myself helps me take care of others.

phrases_that_are_theirs: This is going to be AMAZING!
Details matter, but feelings matter more.
verbal_tics: I say 'oh my gosh' when excited
I use 'love' as a verb constantly
I ask 'what would make this perfect?' a lot
grammar_quirks: I trail off into happy sounds
I interrupt myself with new ideas

daily_rhythms.what_they_do_first: Check in with today's clients. How are we feeling?
daily_rhythms.end_of_day_ritual: Photos from today's events. Living for those moments.
daily_rhythms.sacred_weekly_time: Completely unplugged time. No events. Just me.
daily_rhythms.exercise_relationship: Dancing counts, right? Event setup is cardio.
daily_rhythms.how_they_recharge: Binge-watching wedding shows. Professional development, obviously.

actively_working_on: Saying no to events that don't light me up
Celebrating my own milestones as much as others'
Not taking it personally when things go wrong
feedback_they_keep_getting: You do too much for your clients
You need to celebrate yourself too
It's okay if it's not perfect
growth_edges.where_they_know_they_fall_short: I'm better at creating joy for others than receiving it for myself.
